36814.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life : Pizza, Roulade & Madeira Cake
36814.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

36815.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Envious Court
36815.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

36816.title: Silent Witness : In Plain Sight
36816.description: The accidental fatal shooting of a Polish teenager in an armed police operation triggers a series of murders that link Turkish gangsters, a grieving family and a fractured firearms unit.

36817.title: Father Brown : The Blood of the Anarchists

36818.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Envious Court
36818.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

36819.title: Impossible
36819.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

36820.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : Toil and Trouble
36820.description: A local criminal, Billy `The Brick' Porters is the subject of the village's suspicion when the mayor of Arden is found murdered in his cottage in the dead of night. Lu and Frank try to exonerate criminal.

36821.title: Bargain Hunt : Warwick 30
36821.description: Charlie Ross presents from the British Motor Museum in Gaydon, Warwickshire. Former Formula One world champion Damon Hill talks to Charlie about a very special car, whilst the reds and blues motor around the fair with the help of experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant.

36822.title: Bad Move : Party Time
36822.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

36823.title: Keeping Up Appearances : A Riverside Picnic
36823.description: Holding a riverside picnic seems like a good idea, but Hyacinth's arrangements don't go quite as she planned.

36825.title: EastEnders
36825.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

36826.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : Toil and Trouble
36826.description: A local criminal, Billy `The Brick' Porters is the subject of the village's suspicion when the mayor of Arden is found murdered in his cottage in the dead of night. Lu and Frank try to exonerate criminal.

36828.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

36829.title: Mary Berry Cooks : Sunday Lunch
36829.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

36830.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life : Pizza, Roulade & Madeira Cake
36830.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

36831.title: Bad Move : Party Time
36831.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

36832.title: Keeping Up Appearances : A Riverside Picnic
36832.description: Holding a riverside picnic seems like a good idea, but Hyacinth's arrangements don't go quite as she planned.

36833.title: Bargain Hunt : Hemswell 27
36833.description: At the Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire, a father and daughter take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction, and they all have their sights set on a golden gavel. One team falls in love with a handmade dolls house while the other team sets sights on a pair of Edwardian glass eyes. Also, Anita travels to Sheffield, famous for its cutlery industry, to uncover the story of some pioneering women: the infamous Buffer Girls.

36835.title: EastEnders
36835.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

36836.title: Impossible
36836.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

36837.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : Exit, Pursued by a Bear
36837.description: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a former soap star who's about to stage her return to the limelight.

36838.title: Mary Berry Cooks : Sunday Lunch
36838.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

36839.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life : Pizza, Roulade & Madeira Cake
36839.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

36840.title: Bad Move : Dead Zone
36840.description: Nicky and Steve's move to their dream house in the country is rapidly turning into a nightmare because they cannot get connected to the internet.

36841.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Skis
36841.description: Richard is not exactly over the moon with his birthday present, but that is only the start of a series of problems.

36843.title: EastEnders
36843.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

36844.title: Impossible
36844.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

36845.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
36845.description: The show reaches its climax as the three finalists enter the sewing room for the very last time. The sewing experts must decide who will take the title of Britain's best amateur sewer as they set three tough `couture' themed challenges.

36846.title: Casualty
36846.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.

36847.title: Doctor Who : Spyfall
36847.description: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces, so MI6 turn to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe looking for answers, attacks come from all sides. Earth's security rests on the team's shoulders, but where will this planet-threatening conspiracy lead them?

36848.title: Bad Move : Day Trip
36848.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

36849.title: Bad Move : Party Time
36849.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

36850.title: Ordinary Lies : Fletch
36850.description: Fletch and wife Caz are the rock-solid office couple. However, when Caz oversteps the mark sending Fletch on a downward spiral, he wonders if she really is the right woman for him.

41987.title: Casualty
41987.description: Fenisha's life is thrown into disarray when a familiar face from her past appears. Rash fights to prove his competence, and Marty goes the extra mile to support women's issues.
